title: MetaJudge Benchmark Data v3.1 (Families A+B+C, post-audit)
description: MetaJudge benchmark v3.1 (post-audit): Families A (Calibration, 105 items), B (Selective Abstention, 72 items), C (Self-Correction, 51 clean items). v3.1 fixes: numeric tolerance for 2 items (rel_tol=0.005), 4 unresolved items excluded from clean set (0% T2 accuracy floor effect). Registry: 187 entries with corrected tolerance_params.
